lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: I'm afraid I cannot offer to upgrade any Void Knight armour for you. You do not satisfy the order's requirements.

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: Do you wish me to upgrade any Void Knight armour for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does that do?

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: The top and robes can be upgraded, separately, to give each piece a +3 prayer bonus. It costs 200 Commendation points to upgrade each item.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: Very well. Hand me the top or robe you wish me to upgrade. It costs 200 Commendation points to upgrade each item.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: Do you wish me to upgrade any Void Knight armour for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What does that do?

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: The top and robes can be upgraded, separately, to give each piece a +3 prayer bonus. It costs 200 Commendation points to upgrade each item.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: Very well. Hand me the top or robe you wish me to upgrade. It costs 200 Commendation points to upgrade each item.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any more paint?

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: Certainly. How much do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

sections.title: Using items on the Elite Void Knight
Using ornamented void items, elite void top, or elite void bottom

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: I'm afraid that cannot be upgraded.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, I have something you might be interested in...

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: What a peculiar orb. It doesn't seem useful, but it does seem rather interesting still...

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: I can offer you something in return. Somebody donated us a large quantity of green paint, but it doesn't exactly work with our existing palette.

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: If you would like more of that paint, just ask. We have... too much of it.

lines.speaker: Elite Void Knight
lines.text: No thank you.
